notes: New in this release: the Ghana Tourism Levy. If your business charges the 1% tourism levy, the app now adds it to invoices and to cash sales, keeps track of what you owe the Ghana Tourism Authority, and gives you a Tourism Levy return to remit it — with a note on the purchase side for levy you are charged. You turn it on only if it applies to you. The non-statutory staff deduction (a staff common fund, for example) now carries whatever name you set under Settings, instead of a fixed label — so it reads correctly for your organisation. The dashboard has been redesigned around what needs your attention: the key figures sit across the top, and a single panel gathers every alert — overdue items, unreconciled cheques, backup reminders — in one place. Plus reliability improvements under the hood.
